creator: andy@athame.co.uk
text:
> As you can see in this new screenshots I can resize only in width but
> not in height:
> http://baderna.birosca.org/~aline/share/kontact-big3.jpeg
>
> In this one I've moved the window up by ALT+mouse left button and
> drag but no resize in height:
> http://baderna.birosca.org/~aline/share/kontact-big2.jpeg

Sorry, I can't reproduce that problem here at all.

In http://www.athame.co.uk/images/kontact-small.png you will see a very 
small kontact window at the top-right corner. This is on a 1600x1200 
screen, and without checking I'd estimate this window to be 640x480.

Incidentally, this window is shown as small as I can make it go.

Andy
